entries.deliverable: Freeze Docs-gate truth, current spine truth, and local-only evidence law.
Snapshot the live control-plane split across Hall, Temple, manifests, runtime, and deep root.
Install the 4-master-agent registry and role-to-element mapping.
Install the per-agent 4^6 packet model and active/dormant limits.
Bind the first full-corpus source atlas across every tome and manuscript root.
Bind the first control-surface parity matrix across Hall, Temple, manifests, and runtime.
Install the Hall macro-quest section and Temple mirror section for the 57-loop program.
Emit Loop 1 receipt, first council note, and the canonical loop-state seed.
Inventory the live canonical basis and reconcile it against all current corpus roots.
Scan every manuscript/tome family for neglected bridges, duplicate authorities, and dead mirrors.
Reconcile the deep root 16x16 matrix against live runtime and AP6D surfaces.
Reconcile the 64 observer passes against the current quest and feeder pressure.
Reconcile Level 1-4 metro maps against Hall, Temple, and active manifolds.
Reconcile Level 5-7 metro surfaces and Appendix Q guardrails without promoting drift.
Extract math, hybrid equations, operators, and algorithm candidates from the MATH/CUT/PZPM stack into planner-ready packets.
Collapse the research pass into one synthesis ledger that the planner must consume.
Convert the synthesis ledger into one ranked planner backlog.
Generate 4 master Hall macro quests, one per operational agent.
Generate the matching Temple receiver/binding quests for the same 4 masters.
Generate the 16 macro packet parents under each master for the active loop.
Expand those into 64 observer packets and 256 dependency fibers in the packet atlas.
Attach witness class, writeback target, and restart seed to every promoted packet.
Build the loop acceptance pack: success metrics, blockers, residuals, and stop conditions.
Emit the first planner-complete cycle pack and hold archive-dark-matter issues open rather than smoothing them.
Execute the highest-yield truth-sync repairs first.
Execute manifest/runtime writebacks required by the current loop.
Execute deep-root and metro writebacks required by the current loop.
Execute AP6D registry, packet, and transition-note writebacks required by the current loop.
Execute manuscript, appendix, capsule, and family writebacks required by the current loop.
Close or advance the Hall and Temple quests touched by the loop.
Consolidate worker receipts into one replay-bearing execution bundle.
Hand the loop to the pruner with an explicit change inventory and unresolved residual list.
Prune duplicate routes, stale mirrors, and dead historical subpaths.
Deduplicate Hall/Temple/manifests where the same truth is being carried twice.
Run a Q-SHRINK style compression pass on bulky quest, appendix, and route prose.
Compact ledger structures so packet truth is machine-readable before it is human-polished.
Tighten family routes, atlas linkages, and cross-manuscript bridge naming.
Triage archive dark matter and duplicate ZIP identities without erasing unresolved evidence.
Simplify the active control surfaces so only current truth stays visible.
Emit the prune delta, tightened restart seed, and the next reassessment window.
Refresh the Athena Prime, Fire, Water, Air, and Earth awakening notes for the active loop.
Recompute the cross-agent council handshake and the next compensation lane.
Synchronize Hall, Temple, manifests, runtime, and restart surfaces to one post-prune truth.
Embed hybrid equations, algorithms, and formal operators into the current active framework surfaces.
Update the skill-growth queue and the desired-skill graph for the next loop family.
Parameterize dormant-seat pressure without promoting dormant seats into board-visible work.
Turn gate deficits, blocker drift, and route gaps into explicit agent-readable tasks.
Emit the integration review with unresolved contradictions preserved as named residuals.
Run runtime verification for Docs honesty, frontier agreement, packet freshness, and restart coherence.
Run deep-root verification for 16/256/64/15+0, metro counts, and Appendix Q legality.
Run AP6D verification for 16/64/256/1024/4096, active/dormant honesty, and shadow compatibility.
Run awakening-note verification so no agent note is missing surfaces, handoff, or restart seed.
Run the corpus-wide truth review and explicitly name contradictions instead of smoothing them over.
Roll out the loop outputs in order: control surfaces, deep root, AP6D registry, metro/appendix, manuscript/capsule, awakening notes.
Emit the final integration ledger for that loop family.
Emit the next restart packet spanning Hall, Temple, manifests, metro, runtime, and awakening notes.
Archive the completed 57th loop into receipts and reopen only the highest-yield unblocked next wave.
